name: codexia-mcp
description: Complete Mexican legislation as MCP tools. Full-text search across 59,000+ legal documents with SQLite FTS5 (<100ms). Returns verbatim statutory text — zero LLM summarization. Covers federal laws, jurisprudence, regulations, and state legislation across 34 branches of Mexican law.

tools.name: search_law
tools.description: Full-text search across Mexican legislation using FTS5 snippet()

tools.name: get_article
tools.description: Verbatim text of a specific legal article — zero LLM summarization

tools.name: list_statutes
tools.description: Browsable catalog of legislation filtered by legal branch and jurisdiction

tools.name: check_updates
tools.description: Drift detection against Mexico's Official Gazette (DOF) for legislative reforms
